temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A middle-aged man with graying hair, wearing a black shirt, is on the phone. He looks slightly annoyed and tells the person on the other end to stop talking, saying it's annoying. He is in a grand, dimly lit hall with a large, ornate golden chandelier to his right and a series of glowing orbs on the ceiling behind him. (Storyline: The scene introduces a character who is ending a phone conversation, expressing impatience with the person on the other end.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Annoyed, dismissive. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, ambient, and slightly tense music plays in the background.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of a younger man with dark hair, who is also on the phone. He looks down with a serious and concerned expression as he listens to the person on the other end. He is in a brightly lit, modern-looking room with horizontal blinds in the background. (Storyline: This intercut introduces a second character who is also in a serious phone conversation, creating a parallel narrative.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Questioning, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: The ambient music continues.)
